articles.title: Novelis reports Q4 and full fiscal year 2026 results
articles.summary: Novelis released Q4 and full fiscal year 2026 results on 19 May — the company's first annual earnings as a NYSE-listed public company — with CEO Steve Fisher and CFO Dev Ahuja hosting the call; beverage packaging shipments grew across the year while automotive and specialty declined, with higher scrap costs, adverse product mix, and tariff headwinds weighing on margins. Fisher flagged the Bay Minette, Alabama greenfield as the key capacity response, with commissioning targeted for the second half of 2026.
